# Initial GitHub Issue: Toy Model 5G Protocol

## Goal

Define the minimal real-galaxy rotation-curve fitting protocol before running any fits.

## Tasks

- [ ] Select public dataset.
- [ ] Define allowed parameters.
- [ ] Define fixed global constants.
- [ ] Define per-galaxy allowed variables.
- [ ] Define success and failure metrics.
- [ ] Define plot outputs.
- [ ] Define reproducibility environment.
- [ ] Define no-hidden-freedom rule.
- [ ] Run one dry test.
- [ ] Record failures.

## Rule

No new free parameters after seeing failed fits.
